summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ProntoTicketLive QR code generation and validation system. All features working correctly: Purchase flow generates tickets with proper QR data structure, Check-in page login works, ticket validation shows Valid (green) on first scan and Denied/Used (red) on re-scan, stats update correctly.
passed_tests: Purchase flow completes successfully (Event Detail -> Ticket Selection -> Summary -> Checkout -> Confirmation)
Tickets are generated in localStorage via ticketService.js
Ticket data structure is correct: ticketId (TCK-timestamp-random), orderId (ORD-timestamp), eventId (EVT-id), ticketType, status, qrData
QR code data structure is correct JSON format: {ticketId, orderId, eventId}
QR codes are displayed on Confirmation page using QRCodeSVG component
Check-in page (/checkin) loads correctly with PRONTOTICKET CHECK-IN branding
Staff login works with scanner1/scan123 credentials
Event selection screen shows 3 mock events (EVT-1, EVT-2, EVT-3)
Scanner screen displays event name, staff name, and stats (Total, Admitidos, Pendientes)
First scan of valid ticket returns: valid=true, status='valid', message='✓ ACCESO PERMITIDO'
Re-scan of same ticket returns: valid=false, status='used', message='ACCESO DENEGADO - Este ticket ya fue utilizado'
Stats update correctly after scans: Total stays same, Admitidos increases, Pendientes decreases
Scan logging works - scans are recorded in localStorage (prontoticket_scanned)
Ticket status changes from 'valid' to 'used' after first scan
usedAt timestamp is recorded when ticket is marked as used
critical_code_review_comments: QR code generation and validation logic is well-implemented in ticketService.js
The shared mock logic between ConfirmationPage and CheckInPage works correctly
localStorage persistence for tickets and scans is working as expected

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All QR generation and validation features working correctly

seed_data_creation: None - All data is mocked. Tickets generated dynamically during purchase flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: QR code flow tested successfully. Purchase flow generates tickets with JSON QR data: {ticketId, orderId, eventId}. Check-in validates tickets via ticketService.js. First scan marks ticket as 'used', re-scan returns 'ACCESO DENEGADO'. Stats update correctly. All data stored in localStorage (prontoticket_tickets, prontoticket_scanned). Staff credentials: scanner1/scan123.

mocked_features.ticket_generation: ticketService.js - generateTicketsForOrder() creates tickets in localStorage
mocked_features.qr_validation: ticketService.js - validateTicket() checks ticket status and marks as used
mocked_features.events: CheckInPage.jsx - MOCK_EVENTS array with EVT-1, EVT-2, EVT-3
mocked_features.payment: Mock Stripe Payment Element - simulates card payment

purchase_flow.step_2: Click 'Seleccionar entradas' to open ticket modal
purchase_flow.step_4: Click 'Ver resumen' to go to Purchase Summary
purchase_flow.step_5: Click 'Continuar al pago' to go to Checkout
purchase_flow.step_7: Confirmation page shows order ID, event details, ticket with QR code

checkin_flow.step_3: Select event (EVT-1 for Festival Músical Verano 2025)
checkin_flow.step_4: Scanner screen shows stats: Total, Admitidos, Pendientes
checkin_flow.step_5: First scan: Valid ticket shows green '✓ ACCESO PERMITIDO'
checkin_flow.step_6: Re-scan: Used ticket shows red 'ACCESO DENEGADO'

first_scan.action: Ticket marked as 'used', usedAt timestamp recorded

re_scan.message: ACCESO DENEGADO - Este ticket ya fue utilizado
